variants.name: 苦难根源
variants.ability: 每个夜晚*，你要选择一名玩家：他死亡。每个夜晚*，如果一条咒语以一名邪恶玩家为目标，你会得知施法者且可以选择杀死他。
variants.otherNightReminder: If any cast Spells target an evil player, evil character, or the evil team, place the "Targeted" token on the caster. If any players have the "Targeted" token, tell the Scourge one their names and ask if they'd like to kill said player. Then, ask the Scourge to choose a(nother) player to kill. Kill the player(s) and place a "Dead" token on them.
